title: 15 Cheap Fragrances That Are 10/10 In EVERY Situation

video_class.receipt: sw34VzzWlvA@11759-20160 '15 different scents that you can pick up on the low low... wear just about whenever you want'

resolved.receipt: sw34VzzWlvA@109119-136560 '[Mykonos Inception is] modeled after Imagination... the Louis Vuitton fragrance' + @132400-136560 'legitimately, Imagination is actually a fantastic fragrance. It smells amazing'
resolved.note: FIRST direct resolved mention of this reference product; wrapped in brand-halo pricing critique: 'what if it were released by Carolina Herrera or Burberry... would people still pay that price? But because it's got an L and a V on the bottle' @139040-169040

resolved.receipt: @1008000-1027600 'A surprisingly big seller... one of the more popular men's fragrances in the US... similarities with Jimmy Choo man, but between the two, Coach is a little bit better... a true year round blue scent'

@752560-779760 '[Zenith Blue] has similarities to Savage by Christian Dior... just Savage when it first came out... one of the best ones ever made, um, ever, like ever, ever' + K-style comparative @979199-984480
@429199-462800 '[Apollo] smells quite similar to... Y Odaparfam. And for my money, this is the best Y alternative that you can get right now... smells fantastic, just like YEDP'

@334800-342000 '[Maison Alhambra M]... we want to smell like we're maybe wearing a little bit of Bleu de Chanel, which is how this comes across... just like Bleu de Chanel, you can wear it literally whenever you want' + Sunrise 'a little Bleu de Chanel' @949199
@352479-358560 'Maison Wave... smells closer to Allure Sport if we're talking about Chanel similarities'

receipts: @581839-590959 'Scent of Peace for Him, a little bit of an Aventus style fragrance... that same wearability, that usability, that year-round kind of vibe that Aventus has' (Armaf Blue Sky chain)
@949199-954000 '[Moncler Sunrise] a little Bleu de Chanel, a little Explorer, a little Aventus'
